mapper.select: SELECT a.wrk_mast_id , a.rview_targr_id , a.rsch_prj_id , b.prj_nm , b.prj_targ_yy , b.rsch_ctg_cd , b.rsch_cls_cd , c.rview_tmlt_start_dt , c.rview_tmlt_end_dt , a.adpt_rslt_cd , a.joint_sngl_tp_cd , a.insd_outsd_tp_cd , a.prd_desc , a.rjct_resn_desc , a.rmk_1_desc , a.rmk_2_desc , a.rmk_3_desc FROM rp_pre_rview_opl_list a JOIN rp_rsch_prj_mst b ON a.rsch_prj_id = b.rsch_prj_id AND a.wrk_mast_id = b.wrk_mast_id JOIN rp_pre_rview_mst c ON a.wrk_mast_id = c.wrk_mast_id WHERE a.wrk_mast_id = #{wrk_mast_id} AND a.rview_targr_id = #{rview_targr_id} AND a.rsch_prj_id = #{rsch_prj_id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rp_pre_rview_opl_list ( wrk_mast_id, rview_targr_id, rsch_prj_id, adpt_rslt_cd, joint_sngl_tp_cd, insd_outsd_tp_cd, prd_desc, rjct_resn_desc, rmk_1_desc, rmk_2_desc, rmk_3_desc, firs_reg_pgm_id, firs_reg_dts, firs_reg_user_id, firs_reg_ip, fina_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts, fina_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip ) VALUES ( #{wrk_mast_id}, #{rview_targr_id}, #{rsch_prj_id}, #{adpt_rslt_cd}, #{joint_sngl_tp_cd}, #{insd_outsd_tp_cd}, #{prd_desc}, #{rjct_resn_desc}, #{rmk_1_desc}, #{rmk_2_desc}, #{rmk_3_desc}, #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip}, #{reg_pgm_id}, now(), #{login_emp_no}, #{login_user_ip} )
ON CONFLICT (wrk_mast_id, rview_targr_id, rsch_prj_id) DO UPDATE SET adpt_rslt_cd = excluded.adpt_rslt_cd, joint_sngl_tp_cd = excluded.joint_sngl_tp_cd, insd_outsd_tp_cd = excluded.insd_outsd_tp_cd, prd_desc = excluded.prd_desc, rjct_resn_desc = excluded.rjct_resn_desc, rmk_1_desc = excluded.rmk_1_desc, rmk_2_desc = excluded.rmk_2_desc, rmk_3_desc = excluded.rmk_3_desc, fina_reg_pgm_id = excluded.firs_reg_pgm_id, fina_reg_dts = now(), fina_reg_user_id = excluded.firs_reg_user_id, fina_reg_ip = excluded.firs_reg_ip
